purpose: Current production bundle debt ceiling. The measured I-26 fail-closed admin-override v2 adapter, bounded transport, localized reconciliation state and crash-safe hash-only retry outbox produce 4,470,814 raw / 1,277,201 gzip JavaScript bytes: +10,923 raw / +3,756–3,762 gzip (+0.245% raw) versus the two clean I-25 Windows artifacts. The total ceilings retain only the existing 128-byte raw and 279-byte gzip cross-platform/SHA allowances. Largest JavaScript raw rises by the measured 1,292-byte security-contract delta and remains exact; largest JavaScript gzip and both CSS ceilings retain their prior values. Further increases require an explicit reviewed baseline update.
